name: Court Bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all of the ingredients.
2. Bring the liquid to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and let it simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Allow the broth to cool completely. Chef Tim Owen notes that court bouillon is primarily used for cooking fish and shellfish, as the flavors will be absorbed by any food cooked in this liquid.
